title: Universal Structured Agent Prompt Template (Claude-Optimized XML)
description: A production-grade prompt template using XML-style tags — role, context, task, tools, rules, and output_format — that dramatically reduces hallucination and orchestration failures in Claude agents. This structured approach is replacing raw chat prompts as the standard for reliable agent behavior in 2026.

title: Multi-Agent Team Architect: Build Your Complete AI Workforce
description: A meta-prompt that designs an entire operating system of specialized AI agents — research, content, marketing, sales, analytics — each with defined roles, KPIs, handoff protocols, and guardrails. Tapping into the growing trend of AI teams over monolithic agents for complex production workflows.

title: 61 Ready-to-Use Claude Code Agent Prompts (Agency Agents Repo)
description: An open-source collection of 61 battle-tested agent prompts purpose-built for Claude Code, covering coding, research, content creation, and automation workflows. The repo is gaining traction as the go-to starter kit for developers building agentic tooling without starting from scratch.

title: Design System Agent Skills: Tokens, Validation & Provenance Tracking
description: A new pattern for UI design agents that combines design_intent.md manifests, component token systems, validation layers, and provenance tracking — ensuring AI-generated interfaces stay consistent, auditable, and on-brand across sessions. Essential reading for anyone building design-to-code agent pipelines.

title: 80s & 90s Horror Movie Poster Casting — Viral AI Image Prompt
description: The #PromptOfTheDay taking over AI art communities: upload 1–4 character reference images and this prompt transforms them into authentic retro horror movie posters (Nightmare on Elm Street, Hellraiser, The Thing) with period-accurate costumes, lighting, and composition. Works with Midjourney --cref, Flux, and GPT Image.

title: Cyberpunk Y2K Glitch Aesthetic — SREF Code 3138371237
description: A trending Midjourney style reference code producing saturated orange-red tones, RGB splits, scanlines, VHS noise, and metallic shine — perfect for album covers, streetwear, and esports posters. SREF-based style transfer is becoming the dominant workflow for consistent aesthetic generation across projects.

title: Kling AI Internal Prompting Playbook — 10 Techniques Leaked
description: A leaked internal playbook from Kling AI reveals 10 structured prompting rules for cinematic video generation: scene formula ordering, image-to-video motion-only descriptions, the one-move camera rule, depth stacking, element caps, character locking, first/last frame definitions, and negative prompts. The playbook is reshaping how creators approach AI video prompting across Kling, Runway, and Sora.

title: 46 Free AI Camera Movement Prompts — Complete Library
description: A free resource of 46 copy-paste camera movement prompts organized across 7 categories (Pan/Tilt, Zoom/Lens, Dolly/Track, Drone/Crane, Arc/Orbit, Physical Moves) — designed to eliminate static, amateur-looking AI video. Camera direction is now considered more important than the base subject prompt for producing cinematic results.

title: 1,446+ Trending AI Image Prompts: GPT Image 2 & NanoBanana Dataset
description: An open-source dataset of 1,446 viral AI image prompts complete with author metadata, likes, views, generated image URLs, model type, and category tags — all in JSON under CC BY 4.0. The GPT Image 2 section focuses on posters and typography, while NanoBanana covers portraits and product shots, making it a research-grade resource for prompt engineering.

title: Production-Grade AI Agent Prompt Structure: Stop Chatting, Start Building
description: A detailed breakdown of the prompt structure real AI agents need to survive in production — moving beyond conversational chat to structured system prompts with tool schemas, state management, error handling, and guardrails. Part of a 3-post series on prompt engineering for autonomous agents that has resonated deeply with the r/AI_Agents community.
